platform.name: SafeSkoolZ
platform.tagline: A safe space to speak up and seek help
platform.techStack: React + Vite frontend, Express API, PostgreSQL, OpenAI AI scanning

authentication.description: Multi-role login system with separate flows for pupils (PIN-based), staff (email/password), parents, and PTA members
features: Pupil PIN login with lockout after failed attempts
Demo mode with one-click role login

incidentReporting.description: Core safeguarding feature — pupils, parents, and staff can report incidents with guided forms
features: Multi-step incident form with emotional state tracking
Incident types: bullying, cyberbullying, physical, verbal, relational, sexual, discriminatory
Who is involved: happening to me / someone else / I saw it
Status workflow: reported → under_review → investigating → resolved → closed
Consent request/response flow (staff must get consent before viewing certain details)
Parent notification of incidents involving their child

protocols.description: Formal safeguarding protocols triggered by serious incidents, compliant with LOPIVI/Convivèxit
features: Framework types: LOPIVI, Convivèxit, Machista Violence, Child Protection
Annex template system (structured legal documents per framework)
Referral body management (external agencies, police, social services)
Protocol status: open → active → monitoring → closed
Case tasks for action tracking within protocols

diary.description: Private digital diary for pupils with physical notebook aesthetic
features: Leather-bound diary visual design with lined paper
6 switchable themes: Classic, Ocean, Rose, Forest, Midnight, Sunset
Standard Unicode emoji picker for expression
Private entries — only visible to the pupil
AI-powered safeguarding scanner (GPT-5-nano) — flags serious concerns
AI flagging creates pattern alerts for welfare lead WITHOUT revealing diary content

diagnostics.description: Whole-school safeguarding climate survey with role-specific questions
questionCategories: System Readiness (DSL appointment, policy currency, reporting systems)
features: Emoji-face Likert scale for pupils (with intelligent emoji reversal for negative questions)
Role-specific question bank (pupils get simpler wording)
Results dashboard with radar charts, bar charts, participation stats
Action plan with KPIs, baselines, targets, timeframes
Animated completion screen with role-specific messaging

behaviour.description: Behaviour tracking system with points and levels
features: Behaviour point categories: Kindness, Respect, Teamwork, Effort, Leadership
Levels: Bronze → Silver → Gold → Platinum → Diamond
Staff can award points to pupils
Pupil view of own behaviour record
Direct messages between staff, parents, pupils
Push notifications for incidents, messages, protocol updates

ptaPortal.description: Dedicated portal for PTA members with governance tools
features: KPI dashboard with charts (incident trends, safeguarding metrics)
Direct messaging channel to Safeguarding Coordinator
Policy flagging (raise concerns about policy gaps)
Curated safeguarding resource library (documents, videos, links)

variants.pupil: Quick actions (report, diary), recent behaviour points, wellbeing check
variants.parent: Child overview cards, recent incidents, behaviour summary, PTA contact
variants.teacher: Class overview, recent incidents, behaviour leaderboard, analytics
variants.coordinator: School-wide stats, incident pipeline, protocol status, pattern alerts, analytics charts

alerts.description: Pattern detection and AI-generated alerts for safeguarding leads
features: AI diary content scanning (flags concerns without revealing content)
Pattern alert types: frequency, pattern, ai_flag, manual
Linked to specific pupils with privacy protection

sencoCaseload.description: SENCO-specific caseload management for pupils with additional needs
features: Available pupils list for new assignments
Quick access to pupil behaviour and incident history
Available to all roles including parents and PTA
Chronological feed visible to all roles

newsletter.description: Public-facing newsletter signup for prospective schools

features: All significant actions logged with actor, target, event type

aiFeatures.name: Diary Safeguarding Scanner
aiFeatures.behaviour: Scans for serious safeguarding concerns (abuse, self-harm, neglect, exploitation). If flagged, creates a pattern_alert for the welfare lead with a FIXED safe message — diary text is NEVER stored in alerts or logs.

aiFeatures.name: Diagnostic Action Plan Generator
aiFeatures.behaviour: Analyses survey responses across all roles and generates structured action plans with KPIs, baselines, targets, and timeframes aligned to LOPIVI/Convivèxit frameworks.
